headline: Is It Time To Reassess Home Depot (HD) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Wondering if Home Depot at around US$330.93 is a bargain, fairly priced, or expensive right now? This article walks through the numbers so you can judge that for yourself. The stock has seen a 5.7% decline over the last 7 days and a 15.4% decline over the last 30 days, with returns of a 4.3% decline year to date and a 4.0% decline over the past year, even though the 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 26.3% and 27.7% respectively. Recent headlines have focused on Home Depot as a bellwether for...

headline: Home Depot Builds Pro Loyalty With New AI & Project Management Tools
summary: HD rolls out AI tools and a unified Pro platform to streamline workflows, boost loyalty and deepen engagement with contractors.

headline: The Home Depot Teams Up with David Beckham to Bring the FIFA World Cup 2026™ To Backyards Across the Country
summary: The Home Depot, the Official Home Improvement Retailer of the FIFA World Cup 2026™, has teamed up with soccer club owner and former player David Beckham to encourage soccer fans to bring the energy of the World Cup into their backyards.

headline: January new home sales plunge to the lowest pace since 2022
summary: New home sales fell to the lowest level in four years, despite lower interest rates and builder incentives.
